revision.text:
{{神社| 名称=忍坂山口坐神社| 画像=[[file:DVLKCOrVMAAab8w.jpg|280px]]| 所在地=[[奈良県]][[桜井市]]赤尾42| 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 30 | 緯度秒 = 32 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N| 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 52 | 経度秒 = 9 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E| 祭神=[[大山祇命]]| 社格=[[式内社]]（大）
旧[[村社]]| 本殿=[[磐座]]| 例祭=[[4月15日]]| 地図=Japan Nara| }} [[File:DVLKGTiU0AEJuSR.jpg|thumb|220px|大クスノキ（桜井市指定文化財）]] '''忍坂山口坐神社'''（おしさかやまぐちにますじんじゃ）は、[[奈良県]][[桜井市]]にある神社である。[[式内大社]]で旧[[社格]]は[[村社]]。 [[延喜式]][[祝詞]]に記される[[大和国]]内の山口社6社（飛鳥・石村・忍坂・長谷・畝火・耳無）のうちの1社であり、祈雨神祭八十五座の1つである。 == 祭神 == '''[[大山祇命]]''' 祭神の正体は諸説存在する。 * 『大和名所図会』「今天一神と称す」 * 『大和志』「今称天一神」 * 『修正月勧請神名帳』「當所天一大明神」 * 『郷村社取調帳』「祭神天一神明神」 * 『[[神社覈録]]』「祭神山神大山祇命（中略）今天一神と称す」 * 『[[特選神名牒]]』「祭神 大山祇神」 == 歴史 == === 概史 === 創建年代は不詳。[[天平]]2年([[730年]])に忍坂神戸について記載があり（『大倭國正税帳』）、[[大同]]2年([[807年]])には[[神封]]一戸が寄進されたとある（『[[新抄格勅符抄]]』）。[[延喜式神名帳]]では大社に列し、月次・新嘗の[[奉幣]]に預ると記されている。 社頭案内（桜井市観光協会）によると、[[応永]]4年([[1397年]])に[[金閣寺]]造営の際、当社神木楠の巨樹を伐り天井板としたという。[[江戸時代]]は「天一大明神」と称していた。[[明治]]37年（[[1904年]]）[[近代社格制度]]において村社に列格した。 === 神階 === [[貞観 (日本)|貞観]]元年（[[859年]]）[[1月27日]]従五位上より正五位下『[[日本三代実録]]』 - 表記は「忍坂山口神」 == 境内 == 境内に入ってすぐの左には、周囲7.3ｍ、高さ25ｍ、根元から高さ2ｍの大クスノキがあり、桜井市指定文化財に指定されている。 == アクセス == * [[近畿日本鉄道|近鉄]][[大阪線]][[大和朝倉駅]]から南東へ800ｍ == 外部リンク == * [https://sakurai-kankou.jimdo.com/%E5%90%8D%E6%89%80%E6%97%A7%E8%B7%A1/%E5%BF%8D%E5%9D%82%E8%A1%97%E9%81%93/%E5%BF%8D%E5%9D%82%E5%B1%B1%E5%8F%A3%E5%9D%90%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ 忍坂山口坐神社] - 桜井市観光協会 {{デフォルトソート:おしさかやまくちにますしんしや}} [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|大おしさかやまくちにますしんしや]] [[Category:桜井市の建築物]] [[Category:桜井市の歴史]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]]

revision.text:
{{神社| 名称=忍坂山口坐神社| 画像=[[file:DVLKCOrVMAAab8w.jpg|280px]]| 所在地=[[奈良県]][[桜井市]]赤尾42| 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 30 | 緯度秒 = 32 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N| 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 52 | 経度秒 = 9 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E| 祭神=[[大山祇命]]| 社格=[[式内社]]（大）
旧[[村社]]| 本殿=[[磐座]]| 例祭=[[4月15日]]| 地図=Japan Nara| }} [[File:DVLKGTiU0AEJuSR.jpg|thumb|220px|大クスノキ（桜井市指定文化財）]] '''忍坂山口坐神社'''（おしさかやまぐちにますじんじゃ）は、[[奈良県]][[桜井市]]にある神社である。[[式内大社]]で旧[[社格]]は[[村社]]。 [[延喜式]][[祝詞]]に記される[[大和国]]内の山口社6社（飛鳥・石村・忍坂・長谷・畝火・耳無）のうちの1社であり、祈雨神祭八十五座の1つである。 == 祭神 == '''[[大山祇命]]''' 祭神の正体は諸説存在する。 * 『大和名所図会』「今天一神と称す」 * 『大和志』「今称天一神」 * 『修正月勧請神名帳』「當所天一大明神」 * 『郷村社取調帳』「祭神天一神明神」 * 『[[神社覈録]]』「祭神山神大山祇命（中略）今天一神と称す」 * 『[[特選神名牒]]』「祭神 大山祇神」 == 歴史 == === 概史 === 創建年代は不詳。[[天平]]2年([[730年]])に忍坂神戸について記載があり（『大倭國正税帳』）、[[大同]]2年([[807年]])には[[神封]]一戸が寄進されたとある（『[[新抄格勅符抄]]』）。[[延喜式神名帳]]では大社に列し、月次・新嘗の[[奉幣]]に預ると記されている。 社頭案内（桜井市観光協会）によると、[[応永]]4年([[1397年]])に[[金閣寺]]造営の際、当社神木楠の巨樹を伐り天井板としたという。[[江戸時代]]は「天一大明神」と称していた。[[明治]]37年（[[1904年]]）[[近代社格制度]]において村社に列格した。 === 神階 === [[貞観 (日本)|貞観]]元年（[[859年]]）[[1月27日]]従五位上より正五位下『[[日本三代実録]]』 - 表記は「忍坂山口神」 == 境内 == 境内に入ってすぐの左には、周囲7.3ｍ、高さ25ｍ、根元から高さ2ｍの大クスノキがあり、桜井市指定文化財に指定されている。 == 交通アクセス == * [[近畿日本鉄道|近鉄]][[大阪線]][[大和朝倉駅]]から南東へ800ｍ == 外部リンク == * [https://sakurai-kankou.jimdo.com/%E5%90%8D%E6%89%80%E6%97%A7%E8%B7%A1/%E5%BF%8D%E5%9D%82%E8%A1%97%E9%81%93/%E5%BF%8D%E5%9D%82%E5%B1%B1%E5%8F%A3%E5%9D%90%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ 忍坂山口坐神社] - 桜井市観光協会 {{デフォルトソート:おしさかやまくちにますしんしや}} [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|大おしさかやまくちにますしんしや]] [[Category:桜井市の建築物]] [[Category:桜井市の歴史]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]]

revision.text:
{{神社 | 名称=忍坂山口坐神社 | 画像=[[file:Oshisakayamaguchinimasu Jinja Honden.jpg|280px]] | 所在地=[[奈良県]][[桜井市]]赤尾42 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 30 | 緯度秒 = 32 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 52 | 経度秒 = 9 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 祭神=[[大山祇命]] | 社格=[[式内社]]（大）
旧[[村社]] | 本殿=なし | 神体=[[磐座]] | 創建=不詳 | 例祭=[[4月15日]] | 地図=Japan Nara }} [[File:Oshisakayamaguchinimasu Jinja Kusunoki.jpg|thumb|220px|大クスノキ（桜井市指定文化財）]] '''忍坂山口坐神社'''（おしさかやまぐちにますじんじゃ）は、[[奈良県]][[桜井市]]にある神社である。[[式内大社]]で、旧[[社格]]は[[村社]]。 [[延喜式]][[祝詞]]に記される[[大和国]]内の山口社6社（[[飛鳥坐神社|飛鳥]]・石寸・忍坂・長谷・[[畝火山口神社|畝火]]・[[耳成山口神社|耳無]]）のうちの1社であり、祈雨神祭八十五座の1つである。 == 祭神 == '''[[大山祇命]]''' 祭神の正体に関する記述は以下の通りである。 * 『大和名所図会』「今天一神と称す」 * 『大和志』「今称天一神」 * 『修正月勧請神名帳』「當所天一大明神」 * 『郷村社取調帳』「祭神天一神明神」 * 『[[神社覈録]]』「祭神山神大山祇命（中略）今天一神と称す」 * 『[[特選神名牒]]』「祭神 大山祇神」 == 歴史 == === 概史 === 創建年代は不詳。[[天平]]2年（[[730年]]）に忍坂神戸について記載があり（『[[大和国|大倭國]]正税帳』）、[[大同 (日本)|大同]]2年（[[807年]]）には[[神封]]一戸が寄進されたとある（『[[新抄格勅符抄]]』）。[[延喜式神名帳]]では大社に列し、月次・新嘗の[[奉幣]]に預ると記されている。 社頭案内（桜井市観光協会）によると、[[応永]]4年（[[1397年]]）に[[金閣寺]]造営の際、当社神木楠の巨樹を伐り天井板としたという。[[江戸時代]]は「天一大明神」と称していた。[[明治]]37年（[[1904年]]）[[近代社格制度]]において村社に列格した。 === 神階 === * [[天安 (日本)|天安]]3年（[[859年]]）[[1月27日]]、従五位下より正五位下（『[[日本三代実録]]』）- 表記は「忍坂山口神」。 == 境内 == 境内に入ってすぐの左には、周囲7.3ｍ、高さ25ｍ、根元から高さ2ｍの大クスノキがあり、樹齢500年以上とされており、桜井市指定文化財に指定されている。 == 交通アクセス == * [[近畿日本鉄道|近鉄]][[大阪線]][[大和朝倉駅]]から南東へ800ｍ == 参考文献 == * 社頭案内板 == 外部リンク == * [https://sakurai-kankou.jimdo.com/%E5%90%8D%E6%89%80%E6%97%A7%E8%B7%A1/%E5%BF%8D%E5%9D%82%E8%A1%97%E9%81%93/%E5%BF%8D%E5%9D%82%E5%B1%B1%E5%8F%A3%E5%9D%90%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ 忍坂山口坐神社] - 桜井市観光協会 * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/kindex2.php?J_ID=22707/ 忍坂山口坐神社] - 國學院大學21世紀COEプログラム「神道・神社史料集成」 {{神道 横}} {{デフォルトソート:おしさかやまくちにますしんしや}} [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|大おしさかやまくちにますしんしや]] [[Category:桜井市の建築物]] [[Category:桜井市の歴史]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]]

{{nihongo|'''Oshisaka Yamaguchi Numasu Shrine'''|忍坂山口坐神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Oshisaka Yamaguchi Numasu Shrine'''|忍坂山口坐神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Oshisaka Yamaguchi Numasu Shrine'''|忍坂山口坐神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Oshisaka Yamaguchi Numasu Shrine'''|忍坂山口坐神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Oshisaka Yamaguchi Numasu Shrine'''|忍坂山口坐神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Oshisaka Yamaguchi Numasu Shrine'''|忍坂山口坐神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Oshisaka Yamaguchi Numasu Shrine'''|忍坂山口坐神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Oshisaka Yamaguchi Numasu Shrine'''|忍坂山口坐神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Oshisaka Yamaguchi Numasu Shrine'''|忍坂山口坐神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Oshisaka Yamaguchi Numasu Shrine'''|忍坂山口坐神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Oshisaka Yamaguchi Numasu Shrine'''|忍坂山口坐神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Oshisaka Yamaguchi Numasu Shrine'''|忍坂山口坐神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Oshisaka Yamaguchi Numasu Shrine'''|忍坂山口坐神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Oshisaka Yamaguchi Numasu Shrine'''|忍坂山口坐神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Oshisaka Yamaguchi Numasu Shrine'''|忍坂山口坐神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Oshisaka Yamaguchi Numasu Shrine'''|忍坂山口坐神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Oshisaka Yamaguchi Numasu Shrine'''|忍坂山口坐神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

revision.comment: 27 revisions imported
revision.text:
{{神社 | 名称=忍坂山口坐神社 | 画像=[[file:Oshisakayamaguchinimasu Jinja Honden.jpg|270px]]
拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270}} | 所在地=[[奈良県]][[桜井市]]赤尾42 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 30 | 緯度秒 = 32 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 52 | 経度秒 = 9 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 祭神=[[大山祇命]] | 社格=[[式内社]]（大）
旧[[村社]] | 本殿=なし | 神体=[[磐座]] | 創建=不詳 | 例祭=[[4月15日]] | 地図=Japan Nara }} [[File:Oshisakayamaguchinimasu Jinja Kusunoki.jpg|thumb|220px|大クスノキ（桜井市指定文化財）]] '''忍坂山口坐神社'''（おしさかやまぐちにますじんじゃ）は、[[奈良県]][[桜井市]]にある神社である。[[式内大社]]で、旧[[社格]]は[[村社]]。 [[延喜式]][[祝詞]]に記される[[大和国]]内の山口社6社（[[飛鳥坐神社|飛鳥]]・石寸・忍坂・長谷・[[畝火山口神社|畝火]]・[[耳成山口神社|耳無]]）のうちの1社であり、祈雨神祭八十五座の1つである。 == 祭神 == '''[[大山祇命]]''' 祭神の正体に関する記述は以下の通りである。 * 『大和名所図会』「今天一神と称す」 * 『大和志』「今称天一神」 * 『修正月勧請神名帳』「當所天一大明神」 * 『郷村社取調帳』「祭神天一神明神」 * 『[[神社覈録]]』「祭神山神大山祇命（中略）今天一神と称す」 * 『[[特選神名牒]]』「祭神 大山祇神」 == 歴史 == === 概史 === 創建年代は不詳。[[天平]]2年（[[730年]]）に忍坂神戸について記載があり（『[[大和国|大倭國]]正税帳』）、[[大同 (日本)|大同]]2年（[[807年]]）には[[神封]]一戸が寄進されたとある（『[[新抄格勅符抄]]』）。[[延喜式神名帳]]では大社に列し、月次・新嘗の[[奉幣]]に預ると記されている。 社頭案内（桜井市観光協会）によると、[[応永]]4年（[[1397年]]）に[[金閣寺]]造営の際、当社神木楠の巨樹を伐り天井板としたという。[[江戸時代]]は「天一大明神」と称していた。[[明治]]37年（[[1904年]]）[[近代社格制度]]において村社に列格した。 === 神階 === * [[天安 (日本)|天安]]3年（[[859年]]）[[1月27日]]、従五位下より正五位下（『[[日本三代実録]]』）- 表記は「忍坂山口神」。 == 境内 == 境内に入ってすぐの左には、周囲7.3ｍ、高さ25ｍ、根元から高さ2ｍの大クスノキがあり、樹齢500年以上とされており、桜井市指定文化財に指定されている。 == 交通アクセス == * [[近畿日本鉄道|近鉄]][[大阪線]][[大和朝倉駅]]から南東へ800ｍ == 参考文献 == * 社頭案内板 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://sakurai-kankou.jimdo.com/%E5%90%8D%E6%89%80%E6%97%A7%E8%B7%A1/%E5%BF%8D%E5%9D%82%E8%A1%97%E9%81%93/%E5%BF%8D%E5%9D%82%E5%B1%B1%E5%8F%A3%E5%9D%90%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ 忍坂山口坐神社] - 桜井市観光協会 * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/kindex2.php?J_ID=22707/ 忍坂山口坐神社] - 國學院大學21世紀COEプログラム「神道・神社史料集成」 {{神道 横}} {{デフォルトソート:おしさかやまくちにますしんしや}} [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|大おしさかやまくちにますしんしや]] [[Category:桜井市の建築物]] [[Category:桜井市の歴史]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]]

history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]] == Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 | 名称=忍坂山口坐神社 | 画像=[[file:Oshisakayamaguchinimasu Jinja Honden.jpg|270px]]
拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270}} | 所在地=[[奈良県]][[桜井市]]赤尾42 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 30 | 緯度秒 = 32 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 52 | 経度秒 = 9 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 祭神=[[大山祇命]] | 社格=[[式内社]]（大）
旧[[村社]] | 本殿=なし | 神体=[[磐座]] | 創建=不詳 | 例祭=[[4月15日]] | 地図=Japan Nara }} [[File:Oshisakayamaguchinimasu Jinja Kusunoki.jpg|thumb|220px|大クスノキ（桜井市指定文化財）]] '''忍坂山口坐神社'''（おしさかやまぐちにますじんじゃ）は、[[奈良県]][[桜井市]]にある神社である。[[式内大社]]で、旧[[社格]]は[[村社]]。 [[延喜式]][[祝詞]]に記される[[大和国]]内の山口社6社（[[飛鳥坐神社|飛鳥]]・石寸・忍坂・長谷・[[畝火山口神社|畝火]]・[[耳成山口神社|耳無]]）のうちの1社であり、祈雨神祭八十五座の1つである。 == 祭神 == '''[[大山祇命]]''' 祭神の正体に関する記述は以下の通りである。 * 『大和名所図会』「今天一神と称す」 * 『大和志』「今称天一神」 * 『修正月勧請神名帳』「當所天一大明神」 * 『郷村社取調帳』「祭神天一神明神」 * 『[[神社覈録]]』「祭神山神大山祇命（中略）今天一神と称す」 * 『[[特選神名牒]]』「祭神 大山祇神」 == 歴史 == === 概史 === 創建年代は不詳。[[天平]]2年（[[730年]]）に忍坂神戸について記載があり（『[[大和国|大倭國]]正税帳』）、[[大同 (日本)|大同]]2年（[[807年]]）には[[神封]]一戸が寄進されたとある（『[[新抄格勅符抄]]』）。[[延喜式神名帳]]では大社に列し、月次・新嘗の[[奉幣]]に預ると記されている。 社頭案内（桜井市観光協会）によると、[[応永]]4年（[[1397年]]）に[[金閣寺]]造営の際、当社神木楠の巨樹を伐り天井板としたという。[[江戸時代]]は「天一大明神」と称していた。[[明治]]37年（[[1904年]]）[[近代社格制度]]において村社に列格した。 === 神階 === * [[天安 (日本)|天安]]3年（[[859年]]）[[1月27日]]、従五位下より正五位下（『[[日本三代実録]]』）- 表記は「忍坂山口神」。 == 境内 == 境内に入ってすぐの左には、周囲7.3ｍ、高さ25ｍ、根元から高さ2ｍの大クスノキがあり、樹齢500年以上とされており、桜井市指定文化財に指定されている。 == 交通アクセス == * [[近畿日本鉄道|近鉄]][[大阪線]][[大和朝倉駅]]から南東へ800ｍ == 参考文献 == * 社頭案内板 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://sakurai-kankou.jimdo.com/%E5%90%8D%E6%89%80%E6%97%A7%E8%B7%A1/%E5%BF%8D%E5%9D%82%E8%A1%97%E9%81%93/%E5%BF%8D%E5%9D%82%E5%B1%B1%E5%8F%A3%E5%9D%90%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ 忍坂山口坐神社] - 桜井市観光協会 * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/kindex2.php?J_ID=22707/ 忍坂山口坐神社] - 國學院大學21世紀COEプログラム「神道・神社史料集成」 {{神道 横}} {{デフォルトソート:おしさかやまくちにますしんしや}} [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|大おしさかやまくちにますしんしや]] [[Category:桜井市の建築物]] [[Category:桜井市の歴史]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] ==End Japanese==

history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]] == Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 | 名称=忍坂山口坐神社 | 画像=[[file:Oshisakayamaguchinimasu Jinja Honden.jpg|270px]]
拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270}} | 所在地=[[奈良県]][[桜井市]]赤尾42 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 30 | 緯度秒 = 32 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 52 | 経度秒 = 9 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 祭神=[[大山祇命]] | 社格=[[式内社]]（大）
旧[[村社]] | 本殿=なし | 神体=[[磐座]] | 創建=不詳 | 例祭=[[4月15日]] | 地図=Japan Nara }} [[File:Oshisakayamaguchinimasu Jinja Kusunoki.jpg|thumb|220px|大クスノキ（桜井市指定文化財）]] '''忍坂山口坐神社'''（おしさかやまぐちにますじんじゃ）は、[[奈良県]][[桜井市]]にある神社である。[[式内大社]]で、旧[[社格]]は[[村社]]。 [[延喜式]][[祝詞]]に記される[[大和国]]内の山口社6社（[[飛鳥坐神社|飛鳥]]・石寸・忍坂・長谷・[[畝火山口神社|畝火]]・[[耳成山口神社|耳無]]）のうちの1社であり、祈雨神祭八十五座の1つである。 == 祭神 == '''[[大山祇命]]''' 祭神の正体に関する記述は以下の通りである。 * 『大和名所図会』「今天一神と称す」 * 『大和志』「今称天一神」 * 『修正月勧請神名帳』「當所天一大明神」 * 『郷村社取調帳』「祭神天一神明神」 * 『[[神社覈録]]』「祭神山神大山祇命（中略）今天一神と称す」 * 『[[特選神名牒]]』「祭神 大山祇神」 == 歴史 == === 概史 === 創建年代は不詳。[[天平]]2年（[[730年]]）に忍坂神戸について記載があり（『[[大和国|大倭國]]正税帳』）、[[大同 (日本)|大同]]2年（[[807年]]）には[[神封]]一戸が寄進されたとある（『[[新抄格勅符抄]]』）。[[延喜式神名帳]]では大社に列し、月次・新嘗の[[奉幣]]に預ると記されている。 社頭案内（桜井市観光協会）によると、[[応永]]4年（[[1397年]]）に[[金閣寺]]造営の際、当社神木楠の巨樹を伐り天井板としたという。[[江戸時代]]は「天一大明神」と称していた。[[明治]]37年（[[1904年]]）[[近代社格制度]]において村社に列格した。 === 神階 === * [[天安 (日本)|天安]]3年（[[859年]]）[[1月27日]]、従五位下より正五位下（『[[日本三代実録]]』）- 表記は「忍坂山口神」。 == 境内 == 境内に入ってすぐの左には、周囲7.3ｍ、高さ25ｍ、根元から高さ2ｍの大クスノキがあり、樹齢500年以上とされており、桜井市指定文化財に指定されている。 == 交通アクセス == * [[近畿日本鉄道|近鉄]][[大阪線]][[大和朝倉駅]]から南東へ800ｍ == 参考文献 == * 社頭案内板 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://sakurai-kankou.jimdo.com/%E5%90%8D%E6%89%80%E6%97%A7%E8%B7%A1/%E5%BF%8D%E5%9D%82%E8%A1%97%E9%81%93/%E5%BF%8D%E5%9D%82%E5%B1%B1%E5%8F%A3%E5%9D%90%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ 忍坂山口坐神社] - 桜井市観光協会 * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/kindex2.php?J_ID=22707/ 忍坂山口坐神社] - 國學院大學21世紀COEプログラム「神道・神社史料集成」 {{神道 横}} ==End Japanese== [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|大おしさかやまくちにますしんしや]] [[Category:桜井市の建築物]] [[Category:桜井市の歴史]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]]

旧[[村社]] | 本殿=なし | 神体=[[磐座]] | 創建=不詳 | 例祭=[[4月15日]] | 地図=Japan Nara }} [[File:Oshisakayamaguchinimasu Jinja Kusunoki.jpg|thumb|220px|大クスノキ（桜井市指定文化財）]] '''忍坂山口坐神社'''（おしさかやまぐちにますじんじゃ）は、[[奈良県]][[桜井市]]にある神社である。[[式内大社]]で、旧[[社格]]は[[村社]]。 [[延喜式]][[祝詞]]に記される[[大和国]]内の山口社6社（[[飛鳥坐神社|飛鳥]]・石寸・忍坂・長谷・[[畝火山口神社|畝火]]・[[耳成山口神社|耳無]]）のうちの1社であり、祈雨神祭八十五座の1つである。 == 祭神 == '''[[大山祇命]]''' 祭神の正体に関する記述は以下の通りである。 * 『大和名所図会』「今天一神と称す」 * 『大和志』「今称天一神」 * 『修正月勧請神名帳』「當所天一大明神」 * 『郷村社取調帳』「祭神天一神明神」 * 『[[神社覈録]]』「祭神山神大山祇命（中略）今天一神と称す」 * 『[[特選神名牒]]』「祭神 大山祇神」 == 歴史 == === 概史 === 創建年代は不詳。[[天平]]2年（[[730年]]）に忍坂神戸について記載があり（『[[大和国|大倭國]]正税帳』）、[[大同 (日本)|大同]]2年（[[807年]]）には[[神封]]一戸が寄進されたとある（『[[新抄格勅符抄]]』）。[[延喜式神名帳]]では大社に列し、月次・新嘗の[[奉幣]]に預ると記されている。 社頭案内（桜井市観光協会）によると、[[応永]]4年（[[1397年]]）に[[金閣寺]]造営の際、当社神木楠の巨樹を伐り天井板としたという。[[江戸時代]]は「天一大明神」と称していた。[[明治]]37年（[[1904年]]）[[近代社格制度]]において村社に列格した。 === 神階 === * [[天安 (日本)|天安]]3年（[[859年]]）[[1月27日]]、従五位下より正五位下（『[[日本三代実録]]』）- 表記は「忍坂山口神」。 == 境内 == 境内に入ってすぐの左には、周囲7.3ｍ、高さ25ｍ、根元から高さ2ｍの大クスノキがあり、樹齢500年以上とされており、桜井市指定文化財に指定されている。 == 交通アクセス == * [[近畿日本鉄道|近鉄]][[大阪線]][[大和朝倉駅]]から南東へ800ｍ == 参考文献 == * 社頭案内板 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://sakurai-kankou.jimdo.com/%E5%90%8D%E6%89%80%E6%97%A7%E8%B7%A1/%E5%BF%8D%E5%9D%82%E8%A1%97%E9%81%93/%E5%BF%8D%E5%9D%82%E5%B1%B1%E5%8F%A3%E5%9D%90%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ 忍坂山口坐神社] - 桜井市観光協会 * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/kindex2.php?J_ID=22707/ 忍坂山口坐神社] - 國學院大學21世紀COEプログラム「神道・神社史料集成」 {{神道 横}} ==End Japanese== [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|大おしさかやまくちにますしんしや]] [[Category:桜井市の建築物]] [[Category:桜井市の歴史]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]]

拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270}} | 所在地={{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|桜井市|Q127026}}赤尾42 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 30 | 緯度秒 = 32 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 52 | 経度秒 = 9 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 祭神={{jalink|大山祇命}} | 社格={{jalink|式内社}}（大）
旧{{jalink|村社}} | 本殿=なし | 神体={{jalink|磐座|Q11587880}} | 創建=不詳 | 例祭={{jalink|4月15日|Q2497}} | 地図=Japan Nara }} [[File:Oshisakayamaguchinimasu Jinja Kusunoki.jpg|thumb|220px|大クスノキ（桜井市指定文化財）]] '''忍坂山口坐神社'''（おしさかやまぐちにますじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|桜井市|Q127026}}にある神社である。{{jalink|式内大社|Q134917288}}で、旧{{jalink|社格|Q10444029}}は{{jalink|村社}}。 {{jalink|延喜式|Q1342448}}{{jalink|祝詞|Q1760119}}に記される{{jalink|大和国|Q907495}}内の山口社6社（{{jalink|飛鳥坐神社|Q11665959|飛鳥}}・石寸・忍坂・長谷・{{jalink|畝火山口神社|Q11578590|畝火}}・{{jalink|耳成山口神社|Q11610732|耳無}}）のうちの1社であり、祈雨神祭八十五座の1つである。 == 祭神 == '''{{jalink|大山祇命}}''' 祭神の正体に関する記述は以下の通りである。 * 『大和名所図会』「今天一神と称す」 * 『大和志』「今称天一神」 * 『修正月勧請神名帳』「當所天一大明神」 * 『郷村社取調帳』「祭神天一神明神」 * 『{{jalink|神社覈録|Q11590708}}』「祭神山神大山祇命（中略）今天一神と称す」 * 『{{jalink|特選神名牒|Q11571092}}』「祭神 大山祇神」 == 歴史 == === 概史 === 創建年代は不詳。{{jalink|天平|Q1199879}}2年（{{jalink|730年|Q23563}}）に忍坂神戸について記載があり（『{{jalink|大和国|Q907495|大倭國}}正税帳』）、{{jalink|大同 (日本)|Q1373191|大同}}2年（{{jalink|807年|Q30016}}）には{{jalink|神封|Q1689534}}一戸が寄進されたとある（『{{jalink|新抄格勅符抄|Q11502312}}』）。{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}では大社に列し、月次・新嘗の{{jalink|奉幣|Q11445508}}に預ると記されている。 社頭案内（桜井市観光協会）によると、{{jalink|応永|Q1193078}}4年（{{jalink|1397年|Q6410}}）に{{jalink|金閣寺}}造営の際、当社神木楠の巨樹を伐り天井板としたという。{{jalink|江戸時代|Q184963}}は「天一大明神」と称していた。{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}37年（{{jalink|1904年|Q2046}}）{{jalink|近代社格制度|Q712534}}において村社に列格した。 === 神階 === * {{jalink|天安 (日本)|Q1075611|天安}}3年（{{jalink|859年|Q23897}}）{{jalink|1月27日|Q2284}}、従五位下より正五位下（『{{jalink|日本三代実録|Q1052981}}』）- 表記は「忍坂山口神」。 == 境内 == 境内に入ってすぐの左には、周囲7.3ｍ、高さ25ｍ、根元から高さ2ｍの大クスノキがあり、樹齢500年以上とされており、桜井市指定文化財に指定されている。 == 交通アクセス == * {{jalink|近畿日本鉄道|Q1531085|近鉄}}{{jalink|大阪線}}{{jalink|大和朝倉駅|Q8047967}}から南東へ800ｍ == 参考文献 == * 社頭案内板 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://sakurai-kankou.jimdo.com/%E5%90%8D%E6%89%80%E6%97%A7%E8%B7%A1/%E5%BF%8D%E5%9D%82%E8%A1%97%E9%81%93/%E5%BF%8D%E5%9D%82%E5%B1%B1%E5%8F%A3%E5%9D%90%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ 忍坂山口坐神社] - 桜井市観光協会 * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/kindex2.php?J_ID=22707/ 忍坂山口坐神社] - 國學院大學21世紀COEプログラム「神道・神社史料集成」 {{神道 横}} ==End Japanese== [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|大おしさかやまくちにますしんしや]] [[Category:桜井市の建築物]] [[Category:桜井市の歴史]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]]

画像=[[file:Oshisakayamaguchinimasu Jinja Honden.jpg|270px]]
拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270}} | 所在地={{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|桜井市|Q127026}}赤尾42 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 30 | 緯度秒 = 32 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 52 | 経度秒 = 9 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 祭神={{jalink|大山祇命}} | 社格={{jalink|式内社}}（大）
旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} | 本殿=なし | 神体={{jalink|磐座|Q11587880}} | 創建=不詳 | 例祭={{jalink|4月15日|Q2497}} | 地図=Japan Nara }} [[File:Oshisakayamaguchinimasu Jinja Kusunoki.jpg|thumb|220px|大クスノキ（桜井市指定文化財）]] '''忍坂山口坐神社'''（おしさかやまぐちにますじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|桜井市|Q127026}}にある神社である。{{jalink|式内大社|Q134917288}}で、旧{{jalink|社格|Q10444029}}は{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}。 {{jalink|延喜式|Q1342448}}{{jalink|祝詞|Q1760119}}に記される{{jalink|大和国|Q907495}}内の山口社6社（{{jalink|飛鳥坐神社|Q11665959|飛鳥}}・石寸・忍坂・長谷・{{jalink|畝火山口神社|Q11578590|畝火}}・{{jalink|耳成山口神社|Q11610732|耳無}}）のうちの1社であり、祈雨神祭八十五座の1つである。 === 祭神 === '''{{jalink|大山祇命}}''' 祭神の正体に関する記述は以下の通りである。 * 『大和名所図会』「今天一神と称す」 * 『大和志』「今称天一神」 * 『修正月勧請神名帳』「當所天一大明神」 * 『郷村社取調帳』「祭神天一神明神」 * 『{{jalink|神社覈録|Q11590708}}』「祭神山神大山祇命（中略）今天一神と称す」 * 『{{jalink|特選神名牒|Q11571092}}』「祭神 大山祇神」 === 歴史 === === 概史 === 創建年代は不詳。{{jalink|天平|Q1199879}}2年（{{jalink|730年|Q23563}}）に忍坂神戸について記載があり（『{{jalink|大和国|Q907495|大倭國}}正税帳』）、{{jalink|大同 (日本)|Q1373191|大同}}2年（{{jalink|807年|Q30016}}）には{{jalink|神封|Q1689534}}一戸が寄進されたとある（『{{jalink|新抄格勅符抄|Q11502312}}』）。{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}では大社に列し、月次・新嘗の{{jalink|奉幣|Q11445508}}に預ると記されている。 社頭案内（桜井市観光協会）によると、{{jalink|応永|Q1193078}}4年（{{jalink|1397年|Q6410}}）に{{jalink|金閣寺}}造営の際、当社神木楠の巨樹を伐り天井板としたという。{{jalink|江戸時代|Q184963}}は「天一大明神」と称していた。{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}37年（{{jalink|1904年|Q2046}}）{{jalink|近代社格制度|Q712534}}において村社に列格した。 === 神階 === * {{jalink|天安 (日本)|Q1075611|天安}}3年（{{jalink|859年|Q23897}}）{{jalink|1月27日|Q2284}}、従五位下より正五位下（『{{jalink|日本三代実録|Q1052981}}』）- 表記は「忍坂山口神」。 === 境内 === 境内に入ってすぐの左には、周囲7.3ｍ、高さ25ｍ、根元から高さ2ｍの大クスノキがあり、樹齢500年以上とされており、桜井市指定文化財に指定されている。 === 交通アクセス === * {{jalink|近畿日本鉄道|Q1531085|近鉄}}{{jalink|大阪線}}{{jalink|大和朝倉駅|Q8047967}}から南東へ800ｍ === 参考文献 === * 社頭案内板 === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === * [https://sakurai-kankou.jimdo.com/%E5%90%8D%E6%89%80%E6%97%A7%E8%B7%A1/%E5%BF%8D%E5%9D%82%E8%A1%97%E9%81%93/%E5%BF%8D%E5%9D%82%E5%B1%B1%E5%8F%A3%E5%9D%90%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ 忍坂山口坐神社] - 桜井市観光協会 * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/kindex2.php?J_ID=22707/ 忍坂山口坐神社] - 國學院大學21世紀COEプログラム「神道・神社史料集成」 {{神道 横}} {{デフォルトソート:おしさかやまくちにますしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|大おしさかやまくちにますしんしや]] [[Category:桜井市の建築物]] [[Category:桜井市の歴史]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]]

旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} | 本殿=なし | 神体={{jalink|磐座|Q11587880}} | 創建=不詳 | 例祭={{jalink|4月15日|Q2497}} | 地図=Japan Nara }} [[File:Oshisakayamaguchinimasu Jinja Kusunoki.jpg|thumb|220px|大クスノキ（桜井市指定文化財）]] '''忍坂山口坐神社'''（おしさかやまぐちにますじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|桜井市|Q127026}}にある神社である。{{jalink|式内大社|Q134917288}}で、旧{{jalink|社格|Q10444029}}は{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}。 {{jalink|延喜式|Q1342448}}{{jalink|祝詞|Q1760119}}に記される{{jalink|大和国|Q907495}}内の山口社6社（{{jalink|飛鳥坐神社|Q11665959|飛鳥}}・石寸・忍坂・長谷・{{jalink|畝火山口神社|Q11578590|畝火}}・{{jalink|耳成山口神社|Q11610732|耳無}}）のうちの1社であり、祈雨神祭八十五座の1つである。 === 祭神 === '''{{jalink|大山祇命}}''' 祭神の正体に関する記述は以下の通りである。 * 『大和名所図会』「今天一神と称す」 * 『大和志』「今称天一神」 * 『修正月勧請神名帳』「當所天一大明神」 * 『郷村社取調帳』「祭神天一神明神」 * 『{{jalink|神社覈録|Q11590708}}』「祭神山神大山祇命（中略）今天一神と称す」 * 『{{jalink|特選神名牒|Q11571092}}』「祭神 大山祇神」 === 歴史 === === 概史 === 創建年代は不詳。{{jalink|天平|Q1199879}}2年（{{jalink|730年|Q23563}}）に忍坂神戸について記載があり（『{{jalink|大和国|Q907495|大倭國}}正税帳』）、{{jalink|大同 (日本)|Q1373191|大同}}2年（{{jalink|807年|Q30016}}）には{{jalink|神封|Q1689534}}一戸が寄進されたとある（『{{jalink|新抄格勅符抄|Q11502312}}』）。{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}では大社に列し、月次・新嘗の{{jalink|奉幣|Q11445508}}に預ると記されている。 社頭案内（桜井市観光協会）によると、{{jalink|応永|Q1193078}}4年（{{jalink|1397年|Q6410}}）に{{jalink|金閣寺}}造営の際、当社神木楠の巨樹を伐り天井板としたという。{{jalink|江戸時代|Q184963}}は「天一大明神」と称していた。{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}37年（{{jalink|1904年|Q2046}}）{{jalink|近代社格制度|Q712534}}において村社に列格した。 === 神階 === * {{jalink|天安 (日本)|Q1075611|天安}}3年（{{jalink|859年|Q23897}}）{{jalink|1月27日|Q2284}}、従五位下より正五位下（『{{jalink|日本三代実録|Q1052981}}』）- 表記は「忍坂山口神」。 === 境内 === 境内に入ってすぐの左には、周囲7.3ｍ、高さ25ｍ、根元から高さ2ｍの大クスノキがあり、樹齢500年以上とされており、桜井市指定文化財に指定されている。 === 交通アクセス === * {{jalink|近畿日本鉄道|Q1531085|近鉄}}{{jalink|大阪線}}{{jalink|大和朝倉駅|Q8047967}}から南東へ800ｍ === 参考文献 === * 社頭案内板 === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === * [https://sakurai-kankou.jimdo.com/%E5%90%8D%E6%89%80%E6%97%A7%E8%B7%A1/%E5%BF%8D%E5%9D%82%E8%A1%97%E9%81%93/%E5%BF%8D%E5%9D%82%E5%B1%B1%E5%8F%A3%E5%9D%90%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ 忍坂山口坐神社] - 桜井市観光協会 * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/kindex2.php?J_ID=22707/ 忍坂山口坐神社] - 國學院大學21世紀COEプログラム「神道・神社史料集成」 {{神道 横}} {{デフォルトソート:おしさかやまくちにますしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|大おしさかやまくちにますしんしや]] [[Category:桜井市の建築物]] [[Category:桜井市の歴史]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:pages]]

Yamaguchi-ni-masu Shrine | Image=[[file:Oshisakayamaguchinimasu Jinja Honden.jpg|270px]]
Worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270}} | Location={{jalink|Nara Prefecture|Q131287}}{{jalink|Sakurai City|Q127026}} Akao 42 | Latitude degrees = 34 | Latitude minutes = 30 | Latitude seconds = 32 | N (north latitude) or S (south latitude) = N | Longitude degrees = 135 | Longitude minutes = 52 | Longitude seconds = 9 | E (east longitude) or W (west longitude) = E | Enshrined deity={{jalink|Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto}} | Shrine status={{jalink|Shikinaisha}} (Major)
Former {{jalink|Village shrine|Q134917284}} | Main sanctuary=None | Sacred object={{jalink|Iwakura|Q11587880}} | Founded=Unknown | Annual festival={{jalink|April 15|Q2497}} | Map=Japan Nara }} [[File:Oshisakayamaguchinimasu Jinja Kusunoki.jpg|thumb|220px|Giant camphor tree (designated cultural property of Sakurai City)]] '''Oshisaka Yamaguchi-ni-masu Shrine''' (おしさかやまぐちにますじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine located in {{jalink|Sakurai City|Q127026}}, {{jalink|Nara Prefecture|Q131287}}. It is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha major shrine|Q134917288}}, and its former {{jalink|shrine rank|Q10444029}} was {{jalink|Village shrine|Q134917284}}. It is one of the six Yamaguchi shrines within {{jalink|Yamato Province|Q907495}} listed in the {{jalink|Engishiki|Q1342448}} {{jalink|norito|Q1760119}}—namely, {{jalink|Asukaniimasu Shrine|Q11665959|Asuka}}, Iwaki, Oshisaka, Hase, {{jalink|Unebi Yamaguchi Shrine|Q11578590|Unebi}}, and {{jalink|Miminashi Yamaguchi Shrine|Q11610732|Miminashi}}—and is one of the eighty-five shrines of the rain-prayer deities. === Enshrined deity === '''{{jalink|Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto}}''' Descriptions regarding the identity of the enshrined deity are as follows: * *Yamato Meisho Zue*: “Currently called the deity Ten’ichi.” * *Yamato-shi*: “Now called Ten’ichi no Kami.” * *Shūshōgatsu Kanjō Shinmeichō*: “The Ten’ichi Daimyōjin of this place.” * *Gōsonsha Torishirabechō*: “Enshrined deity: Ten’ichi Shinmei Daimyōjin.” * *{{jalink|Jinja Kakuroku|Q11590708}}*: “Enshrined deity: the mountain god Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto (omitted)… currently called Ten’ichi.” * *{{jalink|Tokusen Shinmeichō|Q11571092}}*: “Enshrined deity: Ōyamatsumi-no-Kami.” === History === === Overview === The date of founding is unknown. A record concerning Oshisaka Shrine estates appears in the 2nd year of {{jalink|Tenpyō|Q1199879}} ({{jalink|730|Q23563}}) in the *{{jalink|Yamato Province|Q907495|Great Yamato Province}} Shōzeichō*. In the 2nd year of {{jalink|Daido (Japan)|Q1373191|Daidō}} ({{jalink|807|Q30016}}), one household of {{jalink|shrine land|Q1689534}} was donated (as recorded in the *{{jalink|Shinshō Kyakuchokufu-shō|Q11502312}}*). In the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}, it is listed as a major shrine and recorded as receiving offerings at the monthly and Niiname festivals. According to an on-site guide (Sakurai City Tourism Association), in the 4th year of {{jalink|Ōei|Q1193078}} ({{jalink|1397|Q6410}}), when {{jalink|Kinkaku-ji}} was constructed, a giant camphor tree sacred to this shrine was felled and used for the ceiling boards. During the {{jalink|Edo period|Q184963}}, the shrine was known as “Ten’ichi Daimyōjin.” In the 37th year of {{jalink|Meiji|Q3125096}} ({{jalink|1904|Q2046}}), under the {{jalink|Modern shrine ranking system|Q712534}}, it was ranked as a village shrine. === Court rank === * On {{jalink|January 27|Q2284}}, 3rd year of {{jalink|Ten’an (Japan)|Q1075611|Ten’an}} ({{jalink|859|Q23897}}), promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade to Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade (*{{jalink|Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981}}*). The notation used is “Oshisaka Yamaguchi Shrine.” === Precincts === Immediately to the left upon entering the precincts stands a giant camphor tree with a circumference of 7.3 meters, a height of 25 meters, and a height of 2 meters from the base. It is estimated to be over 500 years old and is designated as a cultural property of Sakurai City. === Access === * Approximately 800 meters southeast from {{jalink|Yamato-Asakura Station|Q8047967}} on the {{jalink|Osaka Line}} of {{jalink|Kintetsu Railway|Q1531085}} === References === * On-site information board === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://sakurai-kankou.jimdo.com/%E5%90%8D%E6%89%80%E6%97%A7%E8%B7%A1/%E5%BF%8D%E5%9D%82%E8%A1%97%E9%81%93/%E5%BF%8D%E5%9D%82%E5%B1%B1%E5%8F%A3%E5%9D%90%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ Oshisaka Yamaguchi-ni-masu Shrine] – Sakurai City Tourism Association * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/kindex2.php?J_ID=22707/ Oshisaka Yamaguchi-ni-masu Shrine] – Kokugakuin University 21st Century COE Program “Shinto and Shrine Historical Materials Collection” {{Shinto sidebar}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Oshisakayamaguchinimasujinja}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|大おしさかやまくちにますしんしや]] [[Category:桜井市の建築物]] [[Category:桜井市の歴史]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:pages]]

Yamaguchi-ni-masu Shrine | Image=[[file:Oshisakayamaguchinimasu Jinja Honden.jpg|270px]]
Worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270}} | Location={{jalink|Nara Prefecture|Q131287}}{{jalink|Sakurai City|Q127026}} Akao 42 | Latitude degrees = 34 | Latitude minutes = 30 | Latitude seconds = 32 | N (north latitude) or S (south latitude) = N | Longitude degrees = 135 | Longitude minutes = 52 | Longitude seconds = 9 | E (east longitude) or W (west longitude) = E | Enshrined deity={{jalink|Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto}} | Shrine status={{jalink|Shikinaisha}} (Major)
Former {{jalink|Village shrine|Q134917284}} | Main sanctuary=None | Sacred object={{jalink|Iwakura|Q11587880}} | Founded=Unknown | Annual festival={{jalink|April 15|Q2497}} | Map=Japan Nara }} [[File:Oshisakayamaguchinimasu Jinja Kusunoki.jpg|thumb|220px|Giant camphor tree (designated cultural property of Sakurai City)]] '''Oshisaka Yamaguchi-ni-masu Shrine''' (おしさかやまぐちにますじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine located in {{jalink|Sakurai City|Q127026}}, {{jalink|Nara Prefecture|Q131287}}. It is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha major shrine|Q134917288}}, and its former {{jalink|shrine rank|Q10444029}} was {{jalink|Village shrine|Q134917284}}. It is one of the six Yamaguchi shrines within {{jalink|Yamato Province|Q907495}} listed in the {{jalink|Engishiki|Q1342448}} {{jalink|norito|Q1760119}}—namely, {{jalink|Asukaniimasu Shrine|Q11665959|Asuka}}, Iwaki, Oshisaka, Hase, {{jalink|Unebi Yamaguchi Shrine|Q11578590|Unebi}}, and {{jalink|Miminashi Yamaguchi Shrine|Q11610732|Miminashi}}—and is one of the eighty-five shrines of the rain-prayer deities. === Enshrined deity === '''{{jalink|Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto}}''' Descriptions regarding the identity of the enshrined deity are as follows: * *Yamato Meisho Zue*: “Currently called the deity Ten’ichi.” * *Yamato-shi*: “Now called Ten’ichi no Kami.” * *Shūshōgatsu Kanjō Shinmeichō*: “The Ten’ichi Daimyōjin of this place.” * *Gōsonsha Torishirabechō*: “Enshrined deity: Ten’ichi Shinmei Daimyōjin.” * *{{jalink|Jinja Kakuroku|Q11590708}}*: “Enshrined deity: the mountain god Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto (omitted)… currently called Ten’ichi.” * *{{jalink|Tokusen Shinmeichō|Q11571092}}*: “Enshrined deity: Ōyamatsumi-no-Kami.” === History === === Overview === The date of founding is unknown. A record concerning Oshisaka Shrine estates appears in the 2nd year of {{jalink|Tenpyō|Q1199879}} ({{jalink|730|Q23563}}) in the *{{jalink|Yamato Province|Q907495|Great Yamato Province}} Shōzeichō*. In the 2nd year of {{jalink|Daido (Japan)|Q1373191|Daidō}} ({{jalink|807|Q30016}}), one household of {{jalink|shrine land|Q1689534}} was donated (as recorded in the *{{jalink|Shinshō Kyakuchokufu-shō|Q11502312}}*). In the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}, it is listed as a major shrine and recorded as receiving offerings at the monthly and Niiname festivals. According to an on-site guide (Sakurai City Tourism Association), in the 4th year of {{jalink|Ōei|Q1193078}} ({{jalink|1397|Q6410}}), when {{jalink|Kinkaku-ji}} was constructed, a giant camphor tree sacred to this shrine was felled and used for the ceiling boards. During the {{jalink|Edo period|Q184963}}, the shrine was known as “Ten’ichi Daimyōjin.” In the 37th year of {{jalink|Meiji|Q3125096}} ({{jalink|1904|Q2046}}), under the {{jalink|Modern shrine ranking system|Q712534}}, it was ranked as a village shrine. === Court rank === * On {{jalink|January 27|Q2284}}, 3rd year of {{jalink|Ten’an (Japan)|Q1075611|Ten’an}} ({{jalink|859|Q23897}}), promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade to Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade (*{{jalink|Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981}}*). The notation used is “Oshisaka Yamaguchi Shrine.” === Precincts === Immediately to the left upon entering the precincts stands a giant camphor tree with a circumference of 7.3 meters, a height of 25 meters, and a height of 2 meters from the base. It is estimated to be over 500 years old and is designated as a cultural property of Sakurai City. === Access === * Approximately 800 meters southeast from {{jalink|Yamato-Asakura Station|Q8047967}} on the {{jalink|Osaka Line}} of {{jalink|Kintetsu Railway|Q1531085}} === References === * On-site information board === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://sakurai-kankou.jimdo.com/%E5%90%8D%E6%89%80%E6%97%A7%E8%B7%A1/%E5%BF%8D%E5%9D%82%E8%A1%97%E9%81%93/%E5%BF%8D%E5%9D%82%E5%B1%B1%E5%8F%A3%E5%9D%90%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ Oshisaka Yamaguchi-ni-masu Shrine] – Sakurai City Tourism Association * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/kindex2.php?J_ID=22707/ Oshisaka Yamaguchi-ni-masu Shrine] – Kokugakuin University 21st Century COE Program “Shinto and Shrine Historical Materials Collection” {{Shinto sidebar}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Oshisakayamaguchinimasujinja}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|大おしさかやまくちにますしんしや]] [[Category:桜井市の建築物]] [[Category:桜井市の歴史]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:pages]]

(Japan) (P3225) == * 8150005003876 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県桜井市赤尾42', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:忍坂山口坐神社]] {{wikidata link|Q48763696}} == Japanese content == {{Shrine | Name=Oshisaka Yamaguchi-ni-masu Shrine | Image=[[file:Oshisakayamaguchinimasu Jinja Honden.jpg|270px]]
Worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270}} | Location={{jalink|Nara Prefecture|Q131287}}{{jalink|Sakurai City|Q127026}} Akao 42 | Latitude degrees = 34 | Latitude minutes = 30 | Latitude seconds = 32 | N (north latitude) or S (south latitude) = N | Longitude degrees = 135 | Longitude minutes = 52 | Longitude seconds = 9 | E (east longitude) or W (west longitude) = E | Enshrined deity={{jalink|Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto}} | Shrine status={{jalink|Shikinaisha}} (Major)
Former {{jalink|Village shrine|Q134917284}} | Main sanctuary=None | Sacred object={{jalink|Iwakura|Q11587880}} | Founded=Unknown | Annual festival={{jalink|April 15|Q2497}} | Map=Japan Nara }} [[File:Oshisakayamaguchinimasu Jinja Kusunoki.jpg|thumb|220px|Giant camphor tree (designated cultural property of Sakurai City)]] '''Oshisaka Yamaguchi-ni-masu Shrine''' (おしさかやまぐちにますじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine located in {{jalink|Sakurai City|Q127026}}, {{jalink|Nara Prefecture|Q131287}}. It is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha major shrine|Q134917288}}, and its former {{jalink|shrine rank|Q10444029}} was {{jalink|Village shrine|Q134917284}}. It is one of the six Yamaguchi shrines within {{jalink|Yamato Province|Q907495}} listed in the {{jalink|Engishiki|Q1342448}} {{jalink|norito|Q1760119}}—namely, {{jalink|Asukaniimasu Shrine|Q11665959|Asuka}}, Iwaki, Oshisaka, Hase, {{jalink|Unebi Yamaguchi Shrine|Q11578590|Unebi}}, and {{jalink|Miminashi Yamaguchi Shrine|Q11610732|Miminashi}}—and is one of the eighty-five shrines of the rain-prayer deities. === Enshrined deity === '''{{jalink|Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto}}''' Descriptions regarding the identity of the enshrined deity are as follows: * *Yamato Meisho Zue*: “Currently called the deity Ten’ichi.” * *Yamato-shi*: “Now called Ten’ichi no Kami.” * *Shūshōgatsu Kanjō Shinmeichō*: “The Ten’ichi Daimyōjin of this place.” * *Gōsonsha Torishirabechō*: “Enshrined deity: Ten’ichi Shinmei Daimyōjin.” * *{{jalink|Jinja Kakuroku|Q11590708}}*: “Enshrined deity: the mountain god Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto (omitted)… currently called Ten’ichi.” * *{{jalink|Tokusen Shinmeichō|Q11571092}}*: “Enshrined deity: Ōyamatsumi-no-Kami.” === History === === Overview === The date of founding is unknown. A record concerning Oshisaka Shrine estates appears in the 2nd year of {{jalink|Tenpyō|Q1199879}} ({{jalink|730|Q23563}}) in the *{{jalink|Yamato Province|Q907495|Great Yamato Province}} Shōzeichō*. In the 2nd year of {{jalink|Daido (Japan)|Q1373191|Daidō}} ({{jalink|807|Q30016}}), one household of {{jalink|shrine land|Q1689534}} was donated (as recorded in the *{{jalink|Shinshō Kyakuchokufu-shō|Q11502312}}*). In the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}, it is listed as a major shrine and recorded as receiving offerings at the monthly and Niiname festivals. According to an on-site guide (Sakurai City Tourism Association), in the 4th year of {{jalink|Ōei|Q1193078}} ({{jalink|1397|Q6410}}), when {{jalink|Kinkaku-ji}} was constructed, a giant camphor tree sacred to this shrine was felled and used for the ceiling boards. During the {{jalink|Edo period|Q184963}}, the shrine was known as “Ten’ichi Daimyōjin.” In the 37th year of {{jalink|Meiji|Q3125096}} ({{jalink|1904|Q2046}}), under the {{jalink|Modern shrine ranking system|Q712534}}, it was ranked as a village shrine. === Court rank === * On {{jalink|January 27|Q2284}}, 3rd year of {{jalink|Ten’an (Japan)|Q1075611|Ten’an}} ({{jalink|859|Q23897}}), promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade to Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade (*{{jalink|Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981}}*). The notation used is “Oshisaka Yamaguchi Shrine.” === Precincts === Immediately to the left upon entering the precincts stands a giant camphor tree with a circumference of 7.3 meters, a height of 25 meters, and a height of 2 meters from the base. It is estimated to be over 500 years old and is designated as a cultural property of Sakurai City. === Access === * Approximately 800 meters southeast from {{jalink|Yamato-Asakura Station|Q8047967}} on the {{jalink|Osaka Line}} of {{jalink|Kintetsu Railway|Q1531085}} === References === * On-site information board === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://sakurai-kankou.jimdo.com/%E5%90%8D%E6%89%80%E6%97%A7%E8%B7%A1/%E5%BF%8D%E5%9D%82%E8%A1%97%E9%81%93/%E5%BF%8D%E5%9D%82%E5%B1%B1%E5%8F%A3%E5%9D%90%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ Oshisaka Yamaguchi-ni-masu Shrine] – Sakurai City Tourism Association * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/kindex2.php?J_ID=22707/ Oshisaka Yamaguchi-ni-masu Shrine] – Kokugakuin University 21st Century COE Program “Shinto and Shrine Historical Materials Collection” {{Shinto sidebar}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Oshisakayamaguchinimasujinja}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Oshisaka Yamaguchi Numasu Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|大おしさかやまくちにますしんしや]] [[Category:桜井市の建築物]] [[Category:桜井市の歴史]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:pages]]

'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Q3029647|lt=Q3029647|WD=Q3029647}} == P14005 (P14005) == * {{ill|Q11071125|lt=Q11071125|WD=Q11071125}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database * (Japan) (P3225) == * 8150005003876 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県桜井市赤尾42', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:忍坂山口坐神社]] {{wikidata link|Q48763696}} == Japanese content == {{Shrine | Name=Oshisaka Yamaguchi-ni-masu Shrine | Image=[[file:Oshisakayamaguchinimasu Jinja Honden.jpg|270px]]
Worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270}} | Location={{jalink|Nara Prefecture|Q131287}}{{jalink|Sakurai City|Q127026}} Akao 42 | Latitude degrees = 34 | Latitude minutes = 30 | Latitude seconds = 32 | N (north latitude) or S (south latitude) = N | Longitude degrees = 135 | Longitude minutes = 52 | Longitude seconds = 9 | E (east longitude) or W (west longitude) = E | Enshrined deity={{jalink|Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto}} | Shrine status={{jalink|Shikinaisha}} (Major)
Former {{jalink|Village shrine|Q134917284}} | Main sanctuary=None | Sacred object={{jalink|Iwakura|Q11587880}} | Founded=Unknown | Annual festival={{jalink|April 15|Q2497}} | Map=Japan Nara }} [[File:Oshisakayamaguchinimasu Jinja Kusunoki.jpg|thumb|220px|Giant camphor tree (designated cultural property of Sakurai City)]] '''Oshisaka Yamaguchi-ni-masu Shrine''' (おしさかやまぐちにますじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine located in {{jalink|Sakurai City|Q127026}}, {{jalink|Nara Prefecture|Q131287}}. It is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha major shrine|Q134917288}}, and its former {{jalink|shrine rank|Q10444029}} was {{jalink|Village shrine|Q134917284}}. It is one of the six Yamaguchi shrines within {{jalink|Yamato Province|Q907495}} listed in the {{jalink|Engishiki|Q1342448}} {{jalink|norito|Q1760119}}—namely, {{jalink|Asukaniimasu Shrine|Q11665959|Asuka}}, Iwaki, Oshisaka, Hase, {{jalink|Unebi Yamaguchi Shrine|Q11578590|Unebi}}, and {{jalink|Miminashi Yamaguchi Shrine|Q11610732|Miminashi}}—and is one of the eighty-five shrines of the rain-prayer deities. === Enshrined deity === '''{{jalink|Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto}}''' Descriptions regarding the identity of the enshrined deity are as follows: * *Yamato Meisho Zue*: “Currently called the deity Ten’ichi.” * *Yamato-shi*: “Now called Ten’ichi no Kami.” * *Shūshōgatsu Kanjō Shinmeichō*: “The Ten’ichi Daimyōjin of this place.” * *Gōsonsha Torishirabechō*: “Enshrined deity: Ten’ichi Shinmei Daimyōjin.” * *{{jalink|Jinja Kakuroku|Q11590708}}*: “Enshrined deity: the mountain god Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto (omitted)… currently called Ten’ichi.” * *{{jalink|Tokusen Shinmeichō|Q11571092}}*: “Enshrined deity: Ōyamatsumi-no-Kami.” === History === === Overview === The date of founding is unknown. A record concerning Oshisaka Shrine estates appears in the 2nd year of {{jalink|Tenpyō|Q1199879}} ({{jalink|730|Q23563}}) in the *{{jalink|Yamato Province|Q907495|Great Yamato Province}} Shōzeichō*. In the 2nd year of {{jalink|Daido (Japan)|Q1373191|Daidō}} ({{jalink|807|Q30016}}), one household of {{jalink|shrine land|Q1689534}} was donated (as recorded in the *{{jalink|Shinshō Kyakuchokufu-shō|Q11502312}}*). In the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}, it is listed as a major shrine and recorded as receiving offerings at the monthly and Niiname festivals. According to an on-site guide (Sakurai City Tourism Association), in the 4th year of {{jalink|Ōei|Q1193078}} ({{jalink|1397|Q6410}}), when {{jalink|Kinkaku-ji}} was constructed, a giant camphor tree sacred to this shrine was felled and used for the ceiling boards. During the {{jalink|Edo period|Q184963}}, the shrine was known as “Ten’ichi Daimyōjin.” In the 37th year of {{jalink|Meiji|Q3125096}} ({{jalink|1904|Q2046}}), under the {{jalink|Modern shrine ranking system|Q712534}}, it was ranked as a village shrine. === Court rank === * On {{jalink|January 27|Q2284}}, 3rd year of {{jalink|Ten’an (Japan)|Q1075611|Ten’an}} ({{jalink|859|Q23897}}), promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade to Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade (*{{jalink|Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981}}*). The notation used is “Oshisaka Yamaguchi Shrine.” === Precincts === Immediately to the left upon entering the precincts stands a giant camphor tree with a circumference of 7.3 meters, a height of 25 meters, and a height of 2 meters from the base. It is estimated to be over 500 years old and is designated as a cultural property of Sakurai City. === Access === * Approximately 800 meters southeast from {{jalink|Yamato-Asakura Station|Q8047967}} on the {{jalink|Osaka Line}} of {{jalink|Kintetsu Railway|Q1531085}} === References === * On-site information board === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://sakurai-kankou.jimdo.com/%E5%90%8D%E6%89%80%E6%97%A7%E8%B7%A1/%E5%BF%8D%E5%9D%82%E8%A1%97%E9%81%93/%E5%BF%8D%E5%9D%82%E5%B1%B1%E5%8F%A3%E5%9D%90%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ Oshisaka Yamaguchi-ni-masu Shrine] – Sakurai City Tourism Association * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/kindex2.php?J_ID=22707/ Oshisaka Yamaguchi-ni-masu Shrine] – Kokugakuin University 21st Century COE Program “Shinto and Shrine Historical Materials Collection” {{Shinto sidebar}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Oshisakayamaguchinimasujinja}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Oshisaka Yamaguchi Numasu Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Oshisaka Yamaguchi Numasu Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Oshisaka Yamaguchi Numasu Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|大おしさかやまくちにますしんしや]] [[Category:桜井市の建築物]] [[Category:桜井市の歴史]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:pages]]

Yamaguchi-ni-masu Shrine | Image=[[file:Oshisakayamaguchinimasu Jinja Honden.jpg|270px]]
Worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270}} | Location={{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287}}{{ill|lt=Sakurai City|Q127026|WD=Q127026}} Akao 42 | Latitude degrees = 34 | Latitude minutes = 30 | Latitude seconds = 32 | N (north latitude) or S (south latitude) = N | Longitude degrees = 135 | Longitude minutes = 52 | Longitude seconds = 9 | E (east longitude) or W (west longitude) = E | Enshrined deity={{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto|UNKNOWN}} | Shrine status={{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|UNKNOWN}} (Major)
Former {{ill|lt=Village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}} | Main sanctuary=None | Sacred object={{ill|lt=Iwakura|Q11587880|WD=Q11587880}} | Founded=Unknown | Annual festival={{ill|lt=April 15|Q2497|WD=Q2497}} | Map=Japan Nara }} [[File:Oshisakayamaguchinimasu Jinja Kusunoki.jpg|thumb|220px|Giant camphor tree (designated cultural property of Sakurai City)]] '''Oshisaka Yamaguchi-ni-masu Shrine''' (おしさかやまぐちにますじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine located in {{ill|lt=Sakurai City|Q127026|WD=Q127026}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287}}. It is a {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha major shrine|Q134917288|WD=Q134917288}}, and its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029}} was {{ill|lt=Village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}. It is one of the six Yamaguchi shrines within {{ill|lt=Yamato Province|Q907495|WD=Q907495}} listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki|Q1342448|WD=Q1342448}} {{ill|lt=norito|Q1760119|WD=Q1760119}}—namely, {{ill|lt=Asukaniimasu Shrine|Q11665959|WD=Q11665959|lt=Asuka}}, Iwaki, Oshisaka, Hase, {{ill|lt=Unebi Yamaguchi Shrine|Q11578590|WD=Q11578590|lt=Unebi}}, and {{ill|lt=Miminashi Yamaguchi Shrine|Q11610732|WD=Q11610732|lt=Miminashi}}—and is one of the eighty-five shrines of the rain-prayer deities. === Enshrined deity === '''{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto|UNKNOWN}}''' Descriptions regarding the identity of the enshrined deity are as follows: * *Yamato Meisho Zue*: “Currently called the deity Ten’ichi.” * *Yamato-shi*: “Now called Ten’ichi no Kami.” * *Shūshōgatsu Kanjō Shinmeichō*: “The Ten’ichi Daimyōjin of this place.” * *Gōsonsha Torishirabechō*: “Enshrined deity: Ten’ichi Shinmei Daimyōjin.” * *{{ill|lt=Jinja Kakuroku|Q11590708|WD=Q11590708}}*: “Enshrined deity: the mountain god Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto (omitted)… currently called Ten’ichi.” * *{{ill|lt=Tokusen Shinmeichō|Q11571092|WD=Q11571092}}*: “Enshrined deity: Ōyamatsumi-no-Kami.” === History === === Overview === The date of founding is unknown. A record concerning Oshisaka Shrine estates appears in the 2nd year of {{ill|lt=Tenpyō|Q1199879|WD=Q1199879}} ({{ill|lt=730|Q23563|WD=Q23563}}) in the *{{ill|lt=Yamato Province|Q907495|WD=Q907495|lt=Great Yamato Province}} Shōzeichō*. In the 2nd year of {{ill|lt=Daido (Japan)|Q1373191|WD=Q1373191|lt=Daidō}} ({{ill|lt=807|Q30016|WD=Q30016}}), one household of {{ill|lt=shrine land|Q1689534|WD=Q1689534}} was donated (as recorded in the *{{ill|lt=Shinshō Kyakuchokufu-shō|Q11502312|WD=Q11502312}}*). In the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}}, it is listed as a major shrine and recorded as receiving offerings at the monthly and Niiname festivals. According to an on-site guide (Sakurai City Tourism Association), in the 4th year of {{ill|lt=Ōei|Q1193078|WD=Q1193078}} ({{ill|lt=1397|Q6410|WD=Q6410}}), when {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kinkaku-ji|UNKNOWN}} was constructed, a giant camphor tree sacred to this shrine was felled and used for the ceiling boards. During the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963}}, the shrine was known as “Ten’ichi Daimyōjin.” In the 37th year of {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096}} ({{ill|lt=1904|Q2046|WD=Q2046}}), under the {{ill|lt=Modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|WD=Q712534}}, it was ranked as a village shrine. === Court rank === * On {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284}}, 3rd year of {{ill|lt=Ten’an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten’an}} ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897}}), promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade to Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade (*{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981}}*). The notation used is “Oshisaka Yamaguchi Shrine.” === Precincts === Immediately to the left upon entering the precincts stands a giant camphor tree with a circumference of 7.3 meters, a height of 25 meters, and a height of 2 meters from the base. It is estimated to be over 500 years old and is designated as a cultural property of Sakurai City. === Access === * Approximately 800 meters southeast from {{ill|lt=Yamato-Asakura Station|Q8047967|WD=Q8047967}} on the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Osaka Line|UNKNOWN}} of {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Railway|Q1531085|WD=Q1531085}} === References === * On-site information board === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://sakurai-kankou.jimdo.com/%E5%90%8D%E6%89%80%E6%97%A7%E8%B7%A1/%E5%BF%8D%E5%9D%82%E8%A1%97%E9%81%93/%E5%BF%8D%E5%9D%82%E5%B1%B1%E5%8F%A3%E5%9D%90%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ Oshisaka Yamaguchi-ni-masu Shrine] – Sakurai City Tourism Association * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/kindex2.php?J_ID=22707/ Oshisaka Yamaguchi-ni-masu Shrine] – Kokugakuin University 21st Century COE Program “Shinto and Shrine Historical Materials Collection” {{Shinto sidebar}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Oshisakayamaguchinimasujinja}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Oshisaka Yamaguchi Numasu Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Oshisaka Yamaguchi Numasu Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Oshisaka Yamaguchi Numasu Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|大おしさかやまくちにますしんしや]] [[Category:桜井市の建築物]] [[Category:桜井市の歴史]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:pages]]

Yamaguchi-ni-masu Shrine | Image=[[file:Oshisakayamaguchinimasu Jinja Honden.jpg|270px]]
Worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270}} | Location={{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287}}{{ill|lt=Sakurai City|Q127026|WD=Q127026}} Akao 42 | Latitude degrees = 34 | Latitude minutes = 30 | Latitude seconds = 32 | N (north latitude) or S (south latitude) = N | Longitude degrees = 135 | Longitude minutes = 52 | Longitude seconds = 9 | E (east longitude) or W (west longitude) = E | Enshrined deity={{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} | Shrine status={{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}} (Major)
Former {{ill|lt=Village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}} | Main sanctuary=None | Sacred object={{ill|lt=Iwakura|Q11587880|WD=Q11587880}} | Founded=Unknown | Annual festival={{ill|lt=April 15|Q2497|WD=Q2497}} | Map=Japan Nara }} [[File:Oshisakayamaguchinimasu Jinja Kusunoki.jpg|thumb|220px|Giant camphor tree (designated cultural property of Sakurai City)]] '''Oshisaka Yamaguchi-ni-masu Shrine''' (おしさかやまぐちにますじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine located in {{ill|lt=Sakurai City|Q127026|WD=Q127026}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287}}. It is a {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha major shrine|Q134917288|WD=Q134917288}}, and its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029}} was {{ill|lt=Village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}. It is one of the six Yamaguchi shrines within {{ill|lt=Yamato Province|Q907495|WD=Q907495}} listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki|Q1342448|WD=Q1342448}} {{ill|lt=norito|Q1760119|WD=Q1760119}}—namely, {{ill|lt=Asukaniimasu Shrine|Q11665959|WD=Q11665959|lt=Asuka}}, Iwaki, Oshisaka, Hase, {{ill|lt=Unebi Yamaguchi Shrine|Q11578590|WD=Q11578590|lt=Unebi}}, and {{ill|lt=Miminashi Yamaguchi Shrine|Q11610732|WD=Q11610732|lt=Miminashi}}—and is one of the eighty-five shrines of the rain-prayer deities. === Enshrined deity === '''{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}''' Descriptions regarding the identity of the enshrined deity are as follows: * *Yamato Meisho Zue*: “Currently called the deity Ten’ichi.” * *Yamato-shi*: “Now called Ten’ichi no Kami.” * *Shūshōgatsu Kanjō Shinmeichō*: “The Ten’ichi Daimyōjin of this place.” * *Gōsonsha Torishirabechō*: “Enshrined deity: Ten’ichi Shinmei Daimyōjin.” * *{{ill|lt=Jinja Kakuroku|Q11590708|WD=Q11590708}}*: “Enshrined deity: the mountain god Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto (omitted)… currently called Ten’ichi.” * *{{ill|lt=Tokusen Shinmeichō|Q11571092|WD=Q11571092}}*: “Enshrined deity: Ōyamatsumi-no-Kami.” === History === === Overview === The date of founding is unknown. A record concerning Oshisaka Shrine estates appears in the 2nd year of {{ill|lt=Tenpyō|Q1199879|WD=Q1199879}} ({{ill|lt=730|Q23563|WD=Q23563}}) in the *{{ill|lt=Yamato Province|Q907495|WD=Q907495|lt=Great Yamato Province}} Shōzeichō*. In the 2nd year of {{ill|lt=Daido (Japan)|Q1373191|WD=Q1373191|lt=Daidō}} ({{ill|lt=807|Q30016|WD=Q30016}}), one household of {{ill|lt=shrine land|Q1689534|WD=Q1689534}} was donated (as recorded in the *{{ill|lt=Shinshō Kyakuchokufu-shō|Q11502312|WD=Q11502312}}*). In the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}}, it is listed as a major shrine and recorded as receiving offerings at the monthly and Niiname festivals. According to an on-site guide (Sakurai City Tourism Association), in the 4th year of {{ill|lt=Ōei|Q1193078|WD=Q1193078}} ({{ill|lt=1397|Q6410|WD=Q6410}}), when {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kinkaku-ji|1=UNKNOWN}} was constructed, a giant camphor tree sacred to this shrine was felled and used for the ceiling boards. During the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963}}, the shrine was known as “Ten’ichi Daimyōjin.” In the 37th year of {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096}} ({{ill|lt=1904|Q2046|WD=Q2046}}), under the {{ill|lt=Modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|WD=Q712534}}, it was ranked as a village shrine. === Court rank === * On {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284}}, 3rd year of {{ill|lt=Ten’an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten’an}} ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897}}), promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade to Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade (*{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981}}*). The notation used is “Oshisaka Yamaguchi Shrine.” === Precincts === Immediately to the left upon entering the precincts stands a giant camphor tree with a circumference of 7.3 meters, a height of 25 meters, and a height of 2 meters from the base. It is estimated to be over 500 years old and is designated as a cultural property of Sakurai City. === Access === * Approximately 800 meters southeast from {{ill|lt=Yamato-Asakura Station|Q8047967|WD=Q8047967}} on the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Osaka Line|1=UNKNOWN}} of {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Railway|Q1531085|WD=Q1531085}} === References === * On-site information board === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://sakurai-kankou.jimdo.com/%E5%90%8D%E6%89%80%E6%97%A7%E8%B7%A1/%E5%BF%8D%E5%9D%82%E8%A1%97%E9%81%93/%E5%BF%8D%E5%9D%82%E5%B1%B1%E5%8F%A3%E5%9D%90%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ Oshisaka Yamaguchi-ni-masu Shrine] – Sakurai City Tourism Association * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/kindex2.php?J_ID=22707/ Oshisaka Yamaguchi-ni-masu Shrine] – Kokugakuin University 21st Century COE Program “Shinto and Shrine Historical Materials Collection” {{Shinto sidebar}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Oshisakayamaguchinimasujinja}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Oshisaka Yamaguchi Numasu Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Oshisaka Yamaguchi Numasu Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Oshisaka Yamaguchi Numasu Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|大おしさかやまくちにますしんしや]] [[Category:桜井市の建築物]] [[Category:桜井市の歴史]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:pages]]

According to an on-site guide (Sakurai City Tourism Association), in the 4th year of {{ill|lt=Ōei|Q1193078|WD=Q1193078}} ({{ill|lt=1397|Q6410|WD=Q6410}}), when {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kinkaku-ji|1=UNKNOWN}} was constructed, a giant camphor tree sacred to this shrine was felled and used for the ceiling boards. During the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963}}, the shrine was known as “Ten’ichi Daimyōjin.” In the 37th year of {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096}} ({{ill|lt=1904|Q2046|WD=Q2046}}), under the {{ill|lt=Modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|WD=Q712534}}, it was ranked as a village shrine. === Court rank === * On {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284}}, 3rd year of {{ill|lt=Ten’an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten’an}} ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897}}), promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade to Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade (*{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981}}*). The notation used is “Oshisaka Yamaguchi Shrine.” === Precincts === Immediately to the left upon entering the precincts stands a giant camphor tree with a circumference of 7.3 meters, a height of 25 meters, and a height of 2 meters from the base. It is estimated to be over 500 years old and is designated as a cultural property of Sakurai City. === Access === * Approximately 800 meters southeast from {{ill|lt=Yamato-Asakura Station|Q8047967|WD=Q8047967}} on the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Osaka Line|1=UNKNOWN}} of {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Railway|Q1531085|WD=Q1531085}} === References === * On-site information board === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://sakurai-kankou.jimdo.com/%E5%90%8D%E6%89%80%E6%97%A7%E8%B7%A1/%E5%BF%8D%E5%9D%82%E8%A1%97%E9%81%93/%E5%BF%8D%E5%9D%82%E5%B1%B1%E5%8F%A3%E5%9D%90%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ Oshisaka Yamaguchi-ni-masu Shrine] – Sakurai City Tourism Association * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/kindex2.php?J_ID=22707/ Oshisaka Yamaguchi-ni-masu Shrine] – Kokugakuin University 21st Century COE Program “Shinto and Shrine Historical Materials Collection” {{Shinto sidebar}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Oshisakayamaguchinimasujinja}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Oshisaka Yamaguchi Numasu Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Oshisaka Yamaguchi Numasu Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Oshisaka Yamaguchi Numasu Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|大おしさかやまくちにますしんしや]] [[Category:桜井市の建築物]] [[Category:桜井市の歴史]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:pages]]

Worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270}} | Location={{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287}}{{ill|lt=Sakurai City|Q127026|WD=Q127026}} Akao 42 | Latitude degrees = 34 | Latitude minutes = 30 | Latitude seconds = 32 | N (north latitude) or S (south latitude) = N | Longitude degrees = 135 | Longitude minutes = 52 | Longitude seconds = 9 | E (east longitude) or W (west longitude) = E | Enshrined deity={{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} | Shrine status={{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}} (Major)
Former {{ill|lt=Village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}} | Main sanctuary=None | Sacred object={{ill|lt=Iwakura|Q11587880|WD=Q11587880}} | Founded=Unknown | Annual festival={{ill|lt=April 15|Q2497|WD=Q2497}} | Map=Japan Nara }} [[File:Oshisakayamaguchinimasu Jinja Kusunoki.jpg|thumb|220px|Giant camphor tree (designated cultural property of Sakurai City)]] '''Oshisaka Yamaguchi-ni-masu Shrine''' (おしさかやまぐちにますじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine located in {{ill|lt=Sakurai City|Q127026|WD=Q127026}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287}}. It is a {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha major shrine|Q134917288|WD=Q134917288}}, and its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029}} was {{ill|lt=Village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}. It is one of the six Yamaguchi shrines within {{ill|lt=Yamato Province|Q907495|WD=Q907495}} listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki|Q1342448|WD=Q1342448}} {{ill|lt=norito|Q1760119|WD=Q1760119}}—namely, {{ill|lt=Asukaniimasu Shrine|Q11665959|WD=Q11665959|lt=Asuka}}, Iwaki, Oshisaka, Hase, {{ill|lt=Unebi Yamaguchi Shrine|Q11578590|WD=Q11578590|lt=Unebi}}, and {{ill|lt=Miminashi Yamaguchi Shrine|Q11610732|WD=Q11610732|lt=Miminashi}}—and is one of the eighty-five shrines of the rain-prayer deities. === Enshrined deity === '''{{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}''' Descriptions regarding the identity of the enshrined deity are as follows: * *Yamato Meisho Zue*: “Currently called the deity Ten’ichi.” * *Yamato-shi*: “Now called Ten’ichi no Kami.” * *Shūshōgatsu Kanjō Shinmeichō*: “The Ten’ichi Daimyōjin of this place.” * *Gōsonsha Torishirabechō*: “Enshrined deity: Ten’ichi Shinmei Daimyōjin.” * *{{ill|lt=Jinja Kakuroku|Q11590708|WD=Q11590708}}*: “Enshrined deity: the mountain god Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto (omitted)… currently called Ten’ichi.” * *{{ill|lt=Tokusen Shinmeichō|Q11571092|WD=Q11571092}}*: “Enshrined deity: Ōyamatsumi-no-Kami.” === History === === Overview === The date of founding is unknown. A record concerning Oshisaka Shrine estates appears in the 2nd year of {{ill|lt=Tenpyō|Q1199879|WD=Q1199879}} ({{ill|lt=730|Q23563|WD=Q23563}}) in the *{{ill|lt=Yamato Province|Q907495|WD=Q907495|lt=Great Yamato Province}} Shōzeichō*. In the 2nd year of {{ill|lt=Daido (Japan)|Q1373191|WD=Q1373191|lt=Daidō}} ({{ill|lt=807|Q30016|WD=Q30016}}), one household of {{ill|lt=shrine land|Q1689534|WD=Q1689534}} was donated (as recorded in the *{{ill|lt=Shinshō Kyakuchokufu-shō|Q11502312|WD=Q11502312}}*). In the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}}, it is listed as a major shrine and recorded as receiving offerings at the monthly and Niiname festivals. According to an on-site guide (Sakurai City Tourism Association), in the 4th year of {{ill|lt=Ōei|Q1193078|WD=Q1193078}} ({{ill|lt=1397|Q6410|WD=Q6410}}), when {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kinkaku-ji|1=UNKNOWN}} was constructed, a giant camphor tree sacred to this shrine was felled and used for the ceiling boards. During the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963}}, the shrine was known as “Ten’ichi Daimyōjin.” In the 37th year of {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096}} ({{ill|lt=1904|Q2046|WD=Q2046}}), under the {{ill|lt=Modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|WD=Q712534}}, it was ranked as a village shrine. === Court rank === * On {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284}}, 3rd year of {{ill|lt=Ten’an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten’an}} ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897}}), promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade to Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade (*{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981}}*). The notation used is “Oshisaka Yamaguchi Shrine.” === Precincts === Immediately to the left upon entering the precincts stands a giant camphor tree with a circumference of 7.3 meters, a height of 25 meters, and a height of 2 meters from the base. It is estimated to be over 500 years old and is designated as a cultural property of Sakurai City. === Access === * Approximately 800 meters southeast from {{ill|lt=Yamato-Asakura Station|Q8047967|WD=Q8047967}} on the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Osaka Line|1=UNKNOWN}} of {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Railway|Q1531085|WD=Q1531085}} === References === * On-site information board === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://sakurai-kankou.jimdo.com/%E5%90%8D%E6%89%80%E6%97%A7%E8%B7%A1/%E5%BF%8D%E5%9D%82%E8%A1%97%E9%81%93/%E5%BF%8D%E5%9D%82%E5%B1%B1%E5%8F%A3%E5%9D%90%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ Oshisaka Yamaguchi-ni-masu Shrine] – Sakurai City Tourism Association * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/kindex2.php?J_ID=22707/ Oshisaka Yamaguchi-ni-masu Shrine] – Kokugakuin University 21st Century COE Program “Shinto and Shrine Historical Materials Collection” {{Shinto sidebar}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Oshisakayamaguchinimasujinja}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Oshisaka Yamaguchi Numasu Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Oshisaka Yamaguchi Numasu Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Oshisaka Yamaguchi Numasu Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|大おしさかやまくちにますしんしや]] [[Category:桜井市の建築物]] [[Category:桜井市の歴史]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:pages]]

Former {{ill|lt=Village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} | Main sanctuary=None | Sacred object={{ill|lt=Iwakura|Q11587880|WD=Q11587880|1=Iwakura rock}} | Founded=Unknown | Annual festival={{ill|lt=April 15|Q2497|WD=Q2497|1=April 15}} | Map=Japan Nara }} [[File:Oshisakayamaguchinimasu Jinja Kusunoki.jpg|thumb|220px|Giant camphor tree (designated cultural property of Sakurai City)]] '''Oshisaka Yamaguchi-ni-masu Shrine''' (おしさかやまぐちにますじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine located in {{ill|lt=Sakurai City|Q127026|WD=Q127026|1=Sakurai, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha major shrine|Q134917288|WD=Q134917288|1=Shikinai Taisha}}, and its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} was {{ill|lt=Village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. It is one of the six Yamaguchi shrines within {{ill|lt=Yamato Province|Q907495|WD=Q907495|1=Yamato Province}} listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki|Q1342448|WD=Q1342448|1=Engishiki}} {{ill|lt=norito|Q1760119|WD=Q1760119|1=Norito}}—namely, {{ill|lt=Asukaniimasu Shrine|Q11665959|WD=Q11665959|lt=Asuka|1=Asuka-ni-Imasu Shrine}}, Iwaki, Oshisaka, Hase, {{ill|lt=Unebi Yamaguchi Shrine|Q11578590|WD=Q11578590|lt=Unebi|1=Unebiyamaguchi Shrine}}, and {{ill|lt=Miminashi Yamaguchi Shrine|Q11610732|WD=Q11610732|lt=Miminashi|1=Miminashi Yamaguchi Shrine}}—and is one of the eighty-five shrines of the rain-prayer deities. === Enshrined deity === '''{{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto|1=Ōyamatsumi}}''' Descriptions regarding the identity of the enshrined deity are as follows: * *Yamato Meisho Zue*: “Currently called the deity Ten’ichi.” * *Yamato-shi*: “Now called Ten’ichi no Kami.” * *Shūshōgatsu Kanjō Shinmeichō*: “The Ten’ichi Daimyōjin of this place.” * *Gōsonsha Torishirabechō*: “Enshrined deity: Ten’ichi Shinmei Daimyōjin.” * *{{ill|lt=Jinja Kakuroku|Q11590708|WD=Q11590708|1=Jinja Kakuroku}}*: “Enshrined deity: the mountain god Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto (omitted)… currently called Ten’ichi.” * *{{ill|lt=Tokusen Shinmeichō|Q11571092|WD=Q11571092|1=Tokusen Jinmyōchō}}*: “Enshrined deity: Ōyamatsumi-no-Kami.” === History === === Overview === The date of founding is unknown. A record concerning Oshisaka Shrine estates appears in the 2nd year of {{ill|lt=Tenpyō|Q1199879|WD=Q1199879|1=Tenpyō}} ({{ill|lt=730|Q23563|WD=Q23563|1=730}}) in the *{{ill|lt=Yamato Province|Q907495|WD=Q907495|lt=Great Yamato Province|1=Yamato Province}} Shōzeichō*. In the 2nd year of {{ill|lt=Daido (Japan)|Q1373191|WD=Q1373191|lt=Daidō|1=Daidō}} ({{ill|lt=807|Q30016|WD=Q30016|1=807}}), one household of {{ill|lt=shrine land|Q1689534|WD=Q1689534|1=Shinpo}} was donated (as recorded in the *{{ill|lt=Shinshō Kyakuchokufu-shō|Q11502312|WD=Q11502312|1=Shinshō Kyakuchokufushō}}*). In the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}, it is listed as a major shrine and recorded as receiving offerings at the monthly and Niiname festivals. According to an on-site guide (Sakurai City Tourism Association), in the 4th year of {{ill|lt=Ōei|Q1193078|WD=Q1193078|1=Ōei}} ({{ill|lt=1397|Q6410|WD=Q6410|1=1397}}), when {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kinkaku-ji|1=UNKNOWN}} was constructed, a giant camphor tree sacred to this shrine was felled and used for the ceiling boards. During the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963|1=Edo period}}, the shrine was known as “Ten’ichi Daimyōjin.” In the 37th year of {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} ({{ill|lt=1904|Q2046|WD=Q2046|1=1904}}), under the {{ill|lt=Modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|WD=Q712534|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}, it was ranked as a village shrine. === Court rank === * On {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284|1=January 27}}, 3rd year of {{ill|lt=Ten’an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten’an|1=Ten'an}} ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}}), promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade to Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade (*{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}*). The notation used is “Oshisaka Yamaguchi Shrine.” === Precincts === Immediately to the left upon entering the precincts stands a giant camphor tree with a circumference of 7.3 meters, a height of 25 meters, and a height of 2 meters from the base. It is estimated to be over 500 years old and is designated as a cultural property of Sakurai City. === Access === * Approximately 800 meters southeast from {{ill|lt=Yamato-Asakura Station|Q8047967|WD=Q8047967|1=Yamato-Asakura Station}} on the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Osaka Line|1=UNKNOWN}} of {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Railway|Q1531085|WD=Q1531085|1=Kintetsu Railway}} === References === * On-site information board === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://sakurai-kankou.jimdo.com/%E5%90%8D%E6%89%80%E6%97%A7%E8%B7%A1/%E5%BF%8D%E5%9D%82%E8%A1%97%E9%81%93/%E5%BF%8D%E5%9D%82%E5%B1%B1%E5%8F%A3%E5%9D%90%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ Oshisaka Yamaguchi-ni-masu Shrine] – Sakurai City Tourism Association * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/kindex2.php?J_ID=22707/ Oshisaka Yamaguchi-ni-masu Shrine] – Kokugakuin University 21st Century COE Program “Shinto and Shrine Historical Materials Collection” {{Shinto sidebar}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Oshisakayamaguchinimasujinja}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Oshisaka Yamaguchi Numasu Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Oshisaka Yamaguchi Numasu Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Oshisaka Yamaguchi Numasu Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|大おしさかやまくちにますしんしや]] [[Category:桜井市の建築物]] [[Category:桜井市の歴史]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:pages]]

It is a {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha major shrine|Q134917288|WD=Q134917288|1=Shikinai Taisha}}, and its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} was {{ill|lt=Village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. It is one of the six Yamaguchi shrines within {{ill|lt=Yamato Province|Q907495|WD=Q907495|1=Yamato Province}} listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki|Q1342448|WD=Q1342448|1=Engishiki}} {{ill|lt=norito|Q1760119|WD=Q1760119|1=Norito}}—namely, {{ill|lt=Asukaniimasu Shrine|Q11665959|WD=Q11665959|lt=Asuka|1=Asuka-ni-Imasu Shrine}}, Iwaki, Oshisaka, Hase, {{ill|lt=Unebi Yamaguchi Shrine|Q11578590|WD=Q11578590|lt=Unebi|1=Unebiyamaguchi Shrine}}, and {{ill|lt=Miminashi Yamaguchi Shrine|Q11610732|WD=Q11610732|lt=Miminashi|1=Miminashi Yamaguchi Shrine}}—and is one of the eighty-five shrines of the rain-prayer deities. === Enshrined deity === '''{{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto|1=Ōyamatsumi}}''' Descriptions regarding the identity of the enshrined deity are as follows: * *Yamato Meisho Zue*: “Currently called the deity Ten’ichi.” * *Yamato-shi*: “Now called Ten’ichi no Kami.” * *Shūshōgatsu Kanjō Shinmeichō*: “The Ten’ichi Daimyōjin of this place.” * *Gōsonsha Torishirabechō*: “Enshrined deity: Ten’ichi Shinmei Daimyōjin.” * *{{ill|lt=Jinja Kakuroku|Q11590708|WD=Q11590708|1=Jinja Kakuroku}}*: “Enshrined deity: the mountain god Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto (omitted)… currently called Ten’ichi.” * *{{ill|lt=Tokusen Shinmeichō|Q11571092|WD=Q11571092|1=Tokusen Jinmyōchō}}*: “Enshrined deity: Ōyamatsumi-no-Kami.” === History === === Overview === The date of founding is unknown. A record concerning Oshisaka Shrine estates appears in the 2nd year of {{ill|lt=Tenpyō|Q1199879|WD=Q1199879|1=Tenpyō}} ({{ill|lt=730|Q23563|WD=Q23563|1=730}}) in the *{{ill|lt=Yamato Province|Q907495|WD=Q907495|lt=Great Yamato Province|1=Yamato Province}} Shōzeichō*. In the 2nd year of {{ill|lt=Daido (Japan)|Q1373191|WD=Q1373191|lt=Daidō|1=Daidō}} ({{ill|lt=807|Q30016|WD=Q30016|1=807}}), one household of {{ill|lt=shrine land|Q1689534|WD=Q1689534|1=Shinpo}} was donated (as recorded in the *{{ill|lt=Shinshō Kyakuchokufu-shō|Q11502312|WD=Q11502312|1=Shinshō Kyakuchokufushō}}*). In the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}, it is listed as a major shrine and recorded as receiving offerings at the monthly and Niiname festivals. According to an on-site guide (Sakurai City Tourism Association), in the 4th year of {{ill|lt=Ōei|Q1193078|WD=Q1193078|1=Ōei}} ({{ill|lt=1397|Q6410|WD=Q6410|1=1397}}), when {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kinkaku-ji|1=UNKNOWN}} was constructed, a giant camphor tree sacred to this shrine was felled and used for the ceiling boards. During the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963|1=Edo period}}, the shrine was known as “Ten’ichi Daimyōjin.” In the 37th year of {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} ({{ill|lt=1904|Q2046|WD=Q2046|1=1904}}), under the {{ill|lt=Modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|WD=Q712534|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}, it was ranked as a village shrine. === Court rank === * On {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284|1=January 27}}, 3rd year of {{ill|lt=Ten’an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten’an|1=Ten'an}} ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}}), promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade to Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade (*{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}*). The notation used is “Oshisaka Yamaguchi Shrine.” === Precincts === Immediately to the left upon entering the precincts stands a giant camphor tree with a circumference of 7.3 meters, a height of 25 meters, and a height of 2 meters from the base. It is estimated to be over 500 years old and is designated as a cultural property of Sakurai City. === Access === * Approximately 800 meters southeast from {{ill|lt=Yamato-Asakura Station|Q8047967|WD=Q8047967|1=Yamato-Asakura Station}} on the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Osaka Line|1=UNKNOWN}} of {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Railway|Q1531085|WD=Q1531085|1=Kintetsu Railway}} === References === * On-site information board === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://sakurai-kankou.jimdo.com/%E5%90%8D%E6%89%80%E6%97%A7%E8%B7%A1/%E5%BF%8D%E5%9D%82%E8%A1%97%E9%81%93/%E5%BF%8D%E5%9D%82%E5%B1%B1%E5%8F%A3%E5%9D%90%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ Oshisaka Yamaguchi-ni-masu Shrine] – Sakurai City Tourism Association * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/kindex2.php?J_ID=22707/ Oshisaka Yamaguchi-ni-masu Shrine] – Kokugakuin University 21st Century COE Program “Shinto and Shrine Historical Materials Collection” {{Shinto sidebar}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Oshisakayamaguchinimasujinja}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Oshisaka Yamaguchi Numasu Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Oshisaka Yamaguchi Numasu Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Oshisaka Yamaguchi Numasu Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|大おしさかやまくちにますしんしや]] [[Category:桜井市の建築物]] [[Category:桜井市の歴史]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:pages]]
